name: Desde Orellana de la Vieja a Orellana de la Sierra — circular por el Embalse de Orellana
region_intro: Mountain biking around Orellana La Vieja offers diverse terrain where the expansive Orellana Reservoir meets the Extremaduran dehesa and the Guadiana River. The region is characterized by a mix of riverine areas, agricultural landscapes, and wooded pastureland, providing varied routes for cyclists. This strategic location serves as a hub for exploring the areas of La Serena and La Siberia, with trails often utilizing service roads and natural paths. The landscape includes gentle rolling profiles along the Guadiana valley and more challenging sections through the dehesa. Best mountain bike trails around Orellana La Vieja The most popular mountain bike trail is Desde Orellana de la Vieja a Orellana de la Sierra — circular por el Embalse de Orellana, an easy 13.1 miles (21.1 km) trail that takes 1 hour 53 minutes to complete. This circular route offers views of the Orellana Reservoir. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Playa de Orellana – Orellana de la Sierra loop from Orellana la Vieja, a difficult 36.3 miles (58.4 km) path. This route features significant elevation gain and varied terrain around the reservoir. Local mountain bikers also love the Orellana de la Sierra Village – Orellana de la Sierra loop from Navalvillar de Pela, a 27.7 miles (44.6 km) trail leading through the dehesa and rural landscapes, often completed in about 3 hours 59 minutes. Mountain biking around Orellana La Vieja is defined by the Orellana Reservoir, the Guadiana River, and the Extremaduran dehesa, offering routes from easy to difficult. The network provides options for different ability levels, from smooth paths to more challenging climbs. The routes in Orellana La Vieja are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 5.0 stars from 4 reviews. More than 40 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Orellana La Vieja's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available around Orellana La Vieja?
A: There are 9 mountain bike trails documented on Komoot around Orellana La Vieja, offering a variety of experiences for different skill levels. These routes explore the diverse terrain where the Orellana Reservoir meets the Extremaduran dehesa and the Guadiana River.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Orellana La Vieja?
A: The terrain around Orellana La Vieja is quite varied. You'll find a mix of riverine areas, agricultural landscapes, and wooded pastureland (dehesa). Routes can range from smooth paths, often utilizing service roads along irrigation canals, to more challenging sections with significant elevation gain through the dehesa.

Q: Are there any easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Orellana La Vieja?
A: Yes, there are easy trails perfect for beginners. For example, the route &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1201057470/desde-orellana-de-la-vieja-a-orellana-de-la-sierra-circular-por-el-embalse-de-orellana" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Desde Orellana de la Vieja a Orellana de la Sierra — circular por el Embalse de Orellana&lt;/a&gt; is an easy 13.1-mile (21.1 km) circular trail that offers pleasant views of the Orellana Reservoir.

Q: What are some challenging mountain bike routes for experienced riders?
A: For experienced riders seeking a challenge, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/20128637" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Playa de Orellana – Orellana de la Sierra loop from Orellana la Vieja&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 36.3-mile (58.4 km) path. This route features significant elevation gain and varied terrain around the reservoir, making it a demanding ride.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in the area?
A: Yes, Orellana La Vieja offers several circular mountain bike routes. A popular option is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1201057470/desde-orellana-de-la-vieja-a-orellana-de-la-sierra-circular-por-el-embalse-de-orellana" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Desde Orellana de la Vieja a Orellana de la Sierra — circular por el Embalse de Orellana&lt;/a&gt;, which provides a scenic loop around the Orellana Reservoir.

Q: What natural features or landmarks can I see while mountain biking in Orellana La Vieja?
A: Mountain biking in Orellana La Vieja allows you to explore its unique natural environment, often referred to as the 'Blue Heart of Extremadura.' You'll encounter the expansive &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5666953" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Orellana Dam&lt;/a&gt; and its reservoir, the Guadiana River, and the characteristic Extremaduran dehesa. The area is also known for its birdlife, making it an ornithological paradise.

Q: Are there any family-friendly mountain bike trails in Orellana La Vieja?
A: While specific 'family-friendly' designations aren't always explicit, the region offers easy routes with smoother profiles, particularly along the Guadiana valley and service roads. These flatter sections are generally more suitable for families. Always check the route details for distance and elevation to ensure it matches your family's ability.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Orellana La Vieja?
A: The best time to go mountain biking in Orellana La Vieja is typically during the spring and autumn months. The weather is milder and more pleasant for outdoor activities. Summers can be very hot, while winters are generally mild but can have cooler, wetter days.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Orellana La Vieja?
A: The mountain bike routes in Orellana La Vieja are highly rated by the Komoot community, with an average score of 5.0 stars from 4 reviews. Over 40 mountain bikers have used Komoot to explore the varied terrain, often praising the scenic beauty of the reservoir and the diverse landscapes.

Q: Are there any places to eat or stay near the mountain bike trails?
A: Orellana La Vieja is a vibrant hub for leisure and sports, so you'll find various options for accommodation and dining. The town itself and nearby villages offer cafes, pubs, and places to stay. The area is integrated into regional MTB networks, indicating a supportive infrastructure for cyclists.

Q: Where can I find parking for mountain bike trailheads in Orellana La Vieja?
A: As a strategic enclave for mountain biking, Orellana La Vieja generally provides accessible parking options near popular starting points. For routes like those beginning from Orellana la Vieja itself, you can typically find parking within the town or designated areas close to the reservoir and trail access points.

Q: Can I reach Orellana La Vieja by public transport for mountain biking?
A: Orellana La Vieja is part of a wider cycle tourism network in Extremadura. While specific public transport options for carrying bikes might vary, regional bus services connect towns in Extremadura. It's advisable to check local bus schedules and their bike policies in advance if you plan to use public transport.

Q: Are there any specific attractions or points of interest along the trails?
A: Yes, several points of interest can be found near or along the trails. You might pass by the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5666878" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Castle and Palace of the Orellana&lt;/a&gt;, enjoy the sandy shores of &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5667110" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Playa de Orellana&lt;/a&gt;, or explore the charming &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5666635" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Orellana de la Sierra Village&lt;/a&gt;. The vast Orellana Reservoir itself is a major attraction, offering panoramic views.
tips: Orellana de la Sierra is a town located in the old middle of the Sierra de Pela, covered by its northern slope but elevated above the rest of the terrain. It is a good town to see the whole of the Orellana Reservoir.
